ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "body" TEXT /* Detailed body of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score or rating of the post */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the post (e.g., question, tutorial, article) */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Whether the post is featured */,
  "accepted_answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accepted answer (for questions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "parent_tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent tag (for hierarchical tags) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-tag relationship */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "tag_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the tag for the post (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being voted on (nullable if voting on a comment) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being voted on (nullable if voting on a post) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was cast */,
  "vote_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vote (e.g., 1, -1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post in this version */,
  "body" TEXT /* Detailed body of the post in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_versions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_key" TEXT /* Key of the permission */,
  "permission_value" INTEGER /* Value of the permission (true or false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the post (nullable for anonymous views) */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., full, summary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being reported (nullable if reporting a comment) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being reported (nullable if reporting a post) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the content */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the report has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_reports_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "user_badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the badge */,
  "earned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_badge_id FOREIGN KEY ("badge_id") REFERENCES badges ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being bookmarked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who bookmarked the post */,
  "bookmarked_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was bookmarked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_bookmarks_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
